name: Migrate MyGarden into the hub
prompt: Migrate MyGarden into the hub as a module. The standalone app is at MyRecipes/ (it was renamed to MyGarden). Use the recipes module ID and rc_ table prefix.
expected_behavior: Reads MyRecipes/CLAUDE.md and schema files to understand data model
Studies modules/books/ and modules/meds/ as reference patterns
Creates or updates modules/recipes/ with package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts
Creates src/db/schema.ts with rc_-prefixed tables matching standalone schema
Creates src/definition.ts with RECIPES_MODULE ModuleDefinition including correct navigation tabs
Creates src/db/crud.ts with CRUD operations using DatabaseAdapter
Creates src/models/ with Zod schemas for each entity
Creates src/index.ts barrel file
Wires mobile routes at apps/mobile/app/(recipes)/_layout.tsx with tabs matching standalone
Wires web routes at apps/web/app/recipes/ as passthrough wrappers
Creates packages/migration/src/importers/recipes.ts with importFromMyGarden function
Creates src/__tests__/recipes.test.ts with module definition and CRUD tests
Runs pnpm typecheck and pnpm test to validate
Runs pnpm check:parity to verify standalone-hub parity

name: Add MyJournal as a hub module
prompt: Add MyJournal as a hub module. The standalone app is at MyJournal/. It has entries with title, content, mood, tags, and photos. Use 'journal' as the module ID and 'jn_' as the table prefix.
expected_behavior: Reads MyJournal/ standalone app for schema, routes, and features
Adds 'journal' to ModuleId union in packages/module-registry/src/types.ts
Adds 'journal' to ModuleIdSchema, MODULE_IDS, and MODULE_METADATA in module-registry
Creates modules/journal/ package with all config files
Creates jn_-prefixed schema (jn_entries, jn_tags, jn_entry_tags, jn_photos, jn_settings)
Creates JOURNAL_MODULE definition with navigation matching standalone
Creates CRUD layer with row mappers and parameterized queries
Creates Zod models for Entry, Tag, Photo entities
Wires mobile routes with tabs and hidden detail screens
Wires web routes with layout and page files
Creates data importer reading unprefixed tables, writing to jn_-prefixed tables
Writes tests using createModuleTestDatabase pattern
Updates CLAUDE.md prefix table with journal/jn_

name: Wire MyCloset standalone into MyLife
prompt: Wire MyCloset standalone into MyLife as a hub module. The standalone app only has a CLAUDE.md with design docs and no runtime code yet.
expected_behavior: Reads MyCloset/CLAUDE.md to understand planned data model and features
Recognizes that standalone has no runtime code (design docs only)
Reports that this module is parity-deferred per CLAUDE.md rules
Creates a minimal module scaffold with ModuleDefinition based on design docs
Creates placeholder schema based on planned data model from design docs
Marks the module as parity-deferred in any generated documentation
Does NOT create a data importer (no standalone data to import)
Still creates mobile and web route shells for the module
Adds the module ID to module-registry if not already present
